name: nutracore
description: Orquestador raíz para frontend y backend de NutraCore

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,magenta "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
